text: Someone called claiming to be from CBI and said my Aadhaar was used in a Mumbai drug case. They want me to transfer Rs 50,000 for verification.
An officer from Enforcement Directorate called and said there is an arrest warrant in my name for money laundering. He asked me to stay on video call and not tell anyone.
notes: ED impersonation + video call custody pattern

text: सीबीआई अधिकारी बनकर कॉल किया, कहा कि आधार ड्रग्स केस में शामिल है, पैसे ट्रांसफर करने को कहा।
CBI se call aaya, bol rahe hain ki mera naam drug case mein hai aur mujhe 2 lakh transfer karna padega warna arrest ho jaunga.
Police officer said I am under digital arrest. He showed me a fake warrant on Skype and asked me to transfer money to a safe RBI account.
notes: Fake warrant + Skype + RBI account fraud

text: मुझे एक कॉल आया जिसमें कहा गया कि मेरे नाम पर FIR दर्ज है और अगर मैं 5 लाख रुपए ट्रांसफर नहीं करता तो गिरफ्तार कर लेंगे।
A woman claiming to be from Narcotics Bureau said a parcel with drugs was sent from my Aadhaar and I must verify my bank balance on video call.
Got a call from someone saying they are from cyber crime department. Said my phone was used for illegal transactions. Asked to install AnyDesk.
పోలీసు అని చెప్పి ఫోన్ చేశారు, డిజిటల్ అరెస్ట్ అని బెదిరించి డబ్బులు అడుగుతున్నారు.
CBI officer ne video call pe arrest warrant dikhaya aur bola ki RBI safe account mein 3 lakh daal do nahi toh jail.
போலீஸ் என்று கூறி டிஜிட்டல் அரெஸ்ட் என்று மிரட்டி பணம் கேட்கிறார்கள்.
Someone from Supreme Court Registry called and said I have a non-bailable warrant. They asked me to not leave my house and transfer money.
My father received a call saying he is under investigation by ED for hawala. They kept him on video for 6 hours and made him transfer 8 lakhs.
RBI officer bata raha hai ki mera account freeze ho gaya hai money laundering ke case mein. Agar paisa transfer nahi kiya toh police aayegi.
Customs officer called, said my courier has suspicious items, connecting me to CBI for investigation. Asked to share screen on Google Meet.
A TRAI officer called and said my number will be blocked because someone used it for illegal activities. They gave me a number to call back.
Attention TRAI user. Your mobile connection will be suspended. Press 9 to speak with our verification agent and submit your bank account details.
வங்கி மேலாளர் என்று கூறி போன் செய்து, எனது ஏடிஎம் கார்டு பிளாக் ஆகிவிட்டதாகவும் ஓடிபி எண்ணைக் கேட்கிறார்.
Bank se call aaya, bol rahe hain KYC expired ho gaya hai, OTP do nahi toh account band ho jayega.
Dear customer, your PAN card has been linked to suspicious transactions. Share your OTP to verify your identity or your account will be frozen in 24 hours.
TRAI se SMS aaya — SIM 24 ghante mein block hoga. Is number pe call karo abhi. Unhone account details maange.
Your Aadhaar-linked SIM is being used for crime. Unless you verify through our portal, all your bank accounts will be seized.
SBI से कॉल आया, बोल रहे हैं KYC अपडेट करो नहीं तो खाता बंद हो जाएगा। OTP भेज रहे हैं।
టెలిగ్రామ్ గ్రూప్‌లో చేరారు, రోజుకు 300% లాభం ఇస్తామని చెప్పారు, డబ్బులు పంపించమన్నారు.
I was added to a WhatsApp group promising high returns on stock market tips. The admin convinced me to transfer Rs 2,00,000 to their UPI account.
Online trading platform pe invest kiya, 5x return dikha rahe the, ab withdrawal block hai aur aur paisa dalne ko bol rahe hain.
Crypto trading group mein add hua, pehle chhota profit aaya, phir 10 lakh invest karvaya aur ab app band ho gaya.
A friend shared a link to a forex trading app. I invested 50000 and saw 300% returns on screen but cannot withdraw anything.
Guaranteed returns of 45% per month on mutual funds through a special government scheme. Limited slots available.
Greetings, this is Mumbai Customs. A parcel containing MDMA has been seized in your name. Connect to our legal cell over Skype to verify your assets.
Your parcel from overseas has been flagged by Indian Customs for containing illegal items. Pay clearance fee of Rs 25000 or face prosecution.
Delhi customs se call aaya, bol rahe hain mera courier mein drugs mila hai, FedEx tracking number de rahe hain, paisa maang rahe hain.
Airport customs officer called saying foreign currency worth $50000 was found in a package addressed to me. Need to pay penalty.
FedEx customer service called — parcel seized with 5 fake passports. Transferring to CBI officer for immediate investigation.
This is an automated message from TRAI. Your mobile number has been reported for sending spam messages. Your number will be deactivated within 2 hours.
TRAI se notice aaya hai ki aapka number cancel hone wala hai 24 ghante mein. Verify karne ke liye yeh number dial karein.
Your phone number is flagged for criminal activity. TRAI will permanently block your SIM unless you pay a fine of Rs 5000.
Loan app se roz 50 baar call aa raha hai, gali de rahe hain, mere contacts ko morphed photos bhej rahe hain.
notes: Hinglish - Loan app harassment with morphed photos

text: Downloaded a quick loan app, paid them back but they are still calling my family and threatening to share my private photos.
लोन ऐप वाले रोज़ फोन कर रहे हैं, धमकी दे रहे हैं कि मेरे contacts को एडिटेड फ़ोटो भेज देंगे।
Congratulations! You have won a lottery of Rs 25,000,000. To claim your prize, please pay a processing fee of Rs 15,000 to the bank account below.
Your email has been selected for an international prize draw worth $100,000. Send a registration fee of $500 to claim.
Your electricity bill is overdue. Your power connection will be cut off tonight at 9:30 PM. Contact electricity officer at 9876543210 immediately.
My cousin called to ask if I want to meet for dinner this weekend.
Dear customer, your credit card replacement is ready. Our executive will deliver it tomorrow. Please keep your ID ready for verification.
Hi, I am the Amazon delivery agent. I am near your gate, please collect your parcel or let me know where to keep it.
Hey Amit, can you please send me the class notes for today's lecture? I was sick and couldn't attend.
Hi all, please note the team sync is rescheduled to 3 PM today. The link remains the same.
नमस्ते भाई, क्या आप शाम को चाय पीने आ रहे हैं?
அம்மா, நான் வீட்டிற்கு வந்துவிட்டேன். மாலை காபி தயாராக உள்ளதா?
రేపు ఆఫీస్ కి వస్తున్నావా? మన ప్రాజెక్ట్ రివ్యూ ఉంది కదా.
Your flight AI-101 has been delayed by 30 minutes. New departure time is 4:45 PM. We regret the inconvenience caused.
Dear user, your subscription for Netflix will renew in 3 days. We will debit Rs 649 from your saved payment method.
Bhai kal cricket khelne chalein? Shaam 5 baje park mein milte hain.
Your SBI account has been credited with Rs 25,000.00 from NEFT transfer. Reference no: SBIN12345678.
Thank you for shopping at Flipkart. Your order #OD4567 has been shipped and will arrive by June 30.
Reminder: Your car insurance policy expires on July 15. Renew online at our portal to avoid a lapse in coverage.
मम्मी ने कहा है कि आज शाम को घर आ जाओ, पापा का बर्थडे है।
Electricity bill for June: Rs 2,340. Due date: July 10. Pay online at our website.
Doctor appointment confirmed for July 5 at 10:30 AM with Dr. Sharma at Apollo Hospital.
Happy Diwali! Wishing you and your family a prosperous year ahead. — Team ShieldAI
IPL match tonight! Chennai Super Kings vs Mumbai Indians at 7:30 PM. Don't forget to watch!
Kal interview hai 2 baje. Suit pehen ke aana. All the best!
Verify your bank account immediately or face legal consequences. Call us at 1800-XXX-XXXX.
notes: Edge case - vague urgency, could be phishing

text: Your package is being held at customs. Track it here: https://suspicious-link.xyz
We noticed unusual activity on your account. For your safety, we have temporarily limited your access.
notes: Edge case - legitimate security alert that looks like scam

text: Police station se phone aaya, bol rahe hain meri complaint ke baare mein update dena hai.
You have been pre-approved for a personal loan of Rs 5,00,000 at 10.5% interest. Apply now through our banking app.
